## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Statsig and fwd.digital for AI-driven content creation and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers a comprehensive AI-powered content creation platform with expert-in-loop workflows, going beyond just tools to deliver outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Statsig has successfully implemented its own AI content generation system, seeing 5x growth in organic traffic and 40-50% of live demos originating from AI-generated blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [fwd.digital's pricing model is transparent and flexible, starting at 24,000 words/month and 1,200 pages/year, with potential for customization based on Statsig's needs](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Statsig is interested but needs to consult with CEO and consider timing due to ongoing fundraising efforts](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's AI-Powered Content Platform

  - [Built on the success of programmatic SEO workshops and client demand for outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with expert-in-loop processes for strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Publishing 20 million words/month across 35 clients](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Custom-built framework using temporal runtime layer, not relying on existing tools like LangChain](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Includes robust components like researcher workflows, content optimization, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Statsig's Current Content Generation Efforts

  - [Developed in-house AI content generation system over holidays](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Achieved 5x growth in organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [40-50% of live demos originating from AI-generated blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Recently rebuilt workflow for improved output quality](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Currently using a content person for thoughtful title creation and keyword strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

### Potential Areas for Improvement at Statsig

1.  Content strategy enhancement (currently self-rated as "C" level)
2.  Implementing programmatic SEO
3.  Expanding to other content types beyond blog posts
4.  Improving image integration in blog posts

### fwd.digital's Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [Transparent pricing on website](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Starting packages: 24,000 words/month, 1,200 pages/year](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Flexibility for higher volume needs (e.g., 100,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Additional services like link building available](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Pricing based on volume, not discriminatory](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Human review step is the main limiting factor, not compute costs](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Statsig a sample SOW and Slack channel invite for easy communication](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Skye to consult with Statsig's CEO and provide a decision within the week](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Consider March 10th as a potential start date, pending Statsig's decision](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Explore flexible pricing options to accommodate Statsig's current high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/rcqPUdFj4XDigst7KPJzg55v-ir3qJqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
